name: Send message to session
description: Append a message to an existing session (the user's own). Optionally run the agent on the new message. Use to update a long-running sub-session with new instructions, or to leave notes the user will see.

sessionId.description: Target chat id. Must belong to the current user.

message.description: Message content to append (assistant role unless runAgent:true, then user role).

runAgent.description: If true, record the message as a user turn and immediately run the agent in the target session. Default false (just appends as an assistant note).
